g.text: Repo-aware Workspace Server manages the lifecycle of workspaces and its metadata with with two capabilities:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - interactive shell execution via WebSocket + PTY-backend shell process

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - workspace lifecycle management APIs (/status, /suspend, /resume) which allows the workspace metadata to outlive its runtime

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: It has a persistent storage per user and a ephemeral storage for the workspace:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - we use structured filesystem API to interact with files under the ephemeral storage (think: file tree in editor)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - we use interactive shell process to modify files under the persistent home directory

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Upon starting, client specifies workspace metadata like

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: name and owner and optionally a Git repo URL

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - clone repo and set status to CLONING

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - finished cloning and set status to READY

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Client can then go ahead and edit files with the exposed

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: filesystem APIs + running/building/git ops/etc with interactive

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: persistent home directory for the user (/.../<user_id>/home/)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - cleaned up whenever the client disconnects via the `/quit` command at which point server wiped out ephemeral storage and

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
